'''Axion''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] colony [[Planet/Legends|planet]] purchased by the [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoids]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was then that it became a research and development center for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The [[Battle of Axion]] took place there in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], four months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. Years later, pirate [[Reginald Barkbone]] escaped the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guards]] by flying away in the midst of the destruction caused by a [[limpet mine]] he had attached to a [[Power droid/Legends|power droid]].
